title: panicum vollesenii
intro: Panicum vollesenii, also known as Vollesen's panic grass, is a species of grass native to tropical Africa. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower fever and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Panicum vollesenii include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various skin conditions and infections. Herbal preparations of Panicum vollesenii are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or by drying the plant material to make a powder or capsule for oral consumption.
